entry.title: Vex通用函数
entry.content:
VEX 通用函数调用方法 (PROS & LemLib)

本文档总结了基于 PROS 内核和 LemLib 库的常用函数及配置方法。

1. 基础 PROS 函数

马达控制 (Motor Group)

传感器

电磁阀与汽缸

控制器

其他工具函数

自定义PID示例

2.Limlib相关

配置流程概览

  • 定义硬件:
    MotorGroup: 左右马达组
    ImuSensor: 惯性传感器
    RotationSensor: 追踪轮 (Tracking Wheels，如有)
  • 创建 Chassis:
    组合 drivetrain, lateral PID, angular PID, odom sensors, curves.
  • 调用运动函数:

entry.title: First Artical
entry.content:
My first try for bolg

第一次创建blog,算是一个小小的尝试,谢谢各位关注喵~
写下新的结局!

{"Version":3,"ConfVer":0,"Type":0,"FileReferences":{"Moc":"Moc_0.moc3","Textures":["Textures_0_0.png"],"Physics":"Physics_0.json","PhysicsV2":{"File":"Physics_0.json","MaxWeight":0.998},"Motions":{"动作#6":[{"Name":"动作回正","File":"Motions6_0_File_0.json","WrapMode":2,"VarFloats":[{"Name":"OFF/ON","Type":2,"Code":"assign 1"}]},{"Name":"Wink~","File":"Motions6_1_File_0.json","WrapMode":2,"VarFloats":[{"Name":"OFF/ON","Type":1,"Code":"equal 1"}]},{"Name":"我可爱吧~","File":"Motions6_2_File_0.json","WrapMode":2,"VarFloats":[{"Name":"OFF/ON","Type":1,"Code":"equal 1"}]},{"Name":"笑一笑吧~","File":"Motions6_3_File_0.json","WrapMode":2,"VarFloats":[{"Name":"OFF/ON","Type":1,"Code":"equal 1"}]}],"绳子开关#5":[{"Name":"开/回正","Expression":"开","VarFloats":[{"Name":"off/on","Type":2,"Code":"assign 1"}]},{"Name":"关","Expression":"关","VarFloats":[{"Name":"off/on","Type":2,"Code":"assign 0"}]}],"表情3#4":[{"Name":"表情回正","Expression":"表情回正","NextMtn":"表情2#3:表情回正"},{"Name":"闪耀","Expression":"闪耀"}],"表情2#3":[{"Name":"表情回正","Expression":"表情回正","NextMtn":"表情#2:表情回正"},{"Name":"问号","Expression":"问号"}],"表情#2":[{"Name":"表情回正","Expression":"表情回正"},{"Name":"墨镜","Expression":"墨镜"},{"Name":"星星眼","Expression":"星星眼"},{"Name":"圈圈眼","Expression":"圈圈眼"},{"Name":"开心眼","Expression":"开心眼"}],"秋千#1":[{"Name":"拽秋千0","WrapMode":2,"Expression":"拽秋千回正"},{"Name":"拽秋千1","WrapMode":2,"Expression":"拽秋千1","NextMtn":"秋千#1:拽秋千0"},{"Name":"拽秋千2","WrapMode":2,"Expression":"拽秋千2","NextMtn":"秋千#1:拽秋千0"}],"Tick3":[{"Name":"Wink（待机）","File":"Motions6_1_File_0.json","WrapMode":2,"VarFloats":[{"Name":"OFF/ON","Type":1,"Code":"equal 0"}]},{"Name":"可爱（待机）","File":"Motions6_2_File_0.json","WrapMode":2,"VarFloats":[{"Name":"OFF/ON","Type":1,"Code":"equal 0"}]},{"Name":"微笑（待机）","File":"Motions6_3_File_0.json","WrapMode":2,"VarFloats":[{"Name":"OFF/ON","Type":1,"Code":"equal 0"}]},{"Name":"荡秋千（待机）","File":"Motions_Tick3_3_File_0.json","WrapMode":2,"VarFloats":[{"Name":"off/on","Type":1,"Code":"equal 1"}]}],"Start":[{"Name":"初始化","Expression":"开","VarFloats":[{"Name":"off/on","Type":2,"Code":"assign 1"},{"Name":"OFF/ON","Type":2,"Code":"assign 0"}]}]},"Expressions":[{"Name":"表情回正","File":"Expressions_0_File_0.json"},{"Name":"墨镜","File":"Expressions_1_File_0.json"},{"Name":"问号","File":"Expressions_2_File_0.json"},{"Name":"闪耀","File":"Expressions_3_File_0.json"},{"Name":"星星眼","File":"Expressions_4_File_0.json"},{"Name":"圈圈眼","File":"Expressions_5_File_0.json"},{"Name":"开心眼","File":"Expressions_6_File_0.json"},{"Name":"拽秋千1","File":"Expressions_7_File_0.json"},{"Name":"拽秋千2","File":"Expressions_8_File_0.json"},{"Name":"拽秋千回正","File":"Expressions_9_File_0.json"},{"Name":"开","File":"Expressions_10_File_0.json"},{"Name":"关","File":"Expressions_11_File_0.json"}]},"Controllers":{"ParamHit":{},"ParamLoop":{},"KeyTrigger":{"Enabled":true},"ParamTrigger":{},"AreaTrigger":{},"HandTrigger":{},"EyeBlink":{"MinInterval":500,"MaxInterval":6000,"Items":[{"Id":"ParamEyeLOpen","Min":0,"Max":1,"BlendMode":2,"Input":0},{"Id":"ParamEyeROpen","Min":0,"Max":1,"BlendMode":2,"Input":0}],"Enabled":true},"LipSync":{"Gain":5},"MouseTracking":{"SmoothTime":0.15,"Enabled":true},"AutoBreath":{"Enabled":true},"ExtraMotion":{"Enabled":true},"Accelerometer":{"Enabled":true},"Microphone":{},"Transform":{},"FaceTracking":{"AngleX":[{"Id":"ParamAngleX","Input":0}],"AngleY":[{"Id":"ParamAngleY","Input":0}],"AngleZ":[{"Id":"ParamAngleZ","Input":0}],"EyeLOpen":[{"Id":"ParamEyeLOpen","Input":0}],"EyeROpen":[{"Id":"ParamEyeROpen","Input":0}],"EyeballX":[{"Id":"ParamEyeBallX","Input":0}],"EyeballY":[{"Id":"ParamEyeBallY","Input":0}],"MouthOpenY":[{"Id":"ParamMouthOpenY","Input":0}],"MouthForm":[{"Id":"ParamMouthForm","Input":0}],"Enabled":true},"HandTracking":{},"ParamValue":{},"PartOpacity":{},"ArtmeshOpacity":{},"ArtmeshColor":{},"ArtmeshCulling":{"DefaultMode":0},"IntimacySystem":{}},"HitAreas":[{"Name":"左侧秋千","Id":"ArtMesh11","Motion":"秋千#1:拽秋千1"},{"Name":"右侧秋千","Id":"ArtMesh12","Motion":"秋千#1:拽秋千2"},{"Name":"表情回正花","Id":"ArtMesh15","Motion":"表情3#4:表情回正"},{"Name":"星星眼1坠","Id":"ArtMesh77","Motion":"表情#2:星星眼"},{"Name":"圈圈眼2坠","Id":"ArtMesh78","Motion":"表情#2:圈圈眼"},{"Name":"开心眼1叶","Id":"ArtMesh16","Motion":"表情#2:开心眼"},{"Name":"墨镜刘海","Id":"ArtMesh20","Motion":"表情#2:墨镜"},{"Name":"闪耀1枝","Id":"ArtMesh116","Motion":"表情3#4:闪耀"},{"Name":"问号2枝","Id":"ArtMesh115","Motion":"表情2#3:问号"}],"Options":{"TexFixed":true,"TexType":0}}

{"Version":3,"Meta":{"PhysicsSettingCount":7,"TotalInputCount":11,"TotalOutputCount":14,"VertexCount":19,"Fps":60,"EffectiveForces":{"Gravity":{"X":0,"Y":-1},"Wind":{"X":0,"Y":0}},"PhysicsDictionary":[{"Id":"PhysicsSetting1","Name":"秋千特殊"},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting2","Name":"双腿摇晃"},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting3","Name":"秋千摇晃"},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting4","Name":"常驻物理"},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting5","Name":"跟随物理"},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting6","Name":"头发物理"},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting7","Name":"特殊物理"}]},"PhysicsSettings":[{"Id":"PhysicsSetting1","Input":[{"Source":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param32"},"Weight":100,"Type":"X","Reflect":true}],"Output":[{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param31"},"VertexIndex":1,"Scale":80,"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false}],"Vertices":[{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":0},"Mobility":1,"Delay":0.6,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":0},{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":20},"Mobility":0.95,"Delay":0.6,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":20}],"Normalization":{"Position":{"Minimum":-10,"Default":0,"Maximum":10},"Angle":{"Minimum":-10,"Default":0,"Maximum":10}}},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting2","Input":[{"Source":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param31"},"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":true},{"Source":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"ParamBreath"},"Weight":100,"Type":"X","Reflect":false}],"Output":[{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param19"},"VertexIndex":1,"Scale":80,"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false},{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param20"},"VertexIndex":1,"Scale":80,"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false},{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param21"},"VertexIndex":2,"Scale":80,"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false},{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param22"},"VertexIndex":2,"Scale":80,"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false}],"Vertices":[{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":0},"Mobility":1,"Delay":1,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":0},{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":40},"Mobility":0.95,"Delay":1,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":40},{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":60},"Mobility":0.95,"Delay":0.6,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":20}],"Normalization":{"Position":{"Minimum":-10,"Default":0,"Maximum":10},"Angle":{"Minimum":-10,"Default":0,"Maximum":10}}},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting3","Input":[{"Source":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"ParamBreath"},"Weight":100,"Type":"X","Reflect":false}],"Output":[{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param23"},"VertexIndex":1,"Scale":80,"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false},{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param24"},"VertexIndex":2,"Scale":80,"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false}],"Vertices":[{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":0},"Mobility":1,"Delay":0.6,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":20},{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":20},"Mobility":0.95,"Delay":0.6,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":20},{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":40},"Mobility":0.95,"Delay":0.6,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":20}],"Normalization":{"Position":{"Minimum":-10,"Default":0,"Maximum":10},"Angle":{"Minimum":-10,"Default":0,"Maximum":10}}},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting4","Input":[{"Source":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"ParamBreath"},"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false}],"Output":[{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param25"},"VertexIndex":1,"Scale":80,"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false},{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param26"},"VertexIndex":2,"Scale":80,"Weight":100,"Type":"Angle","Reflect":false}],"Vertices":[{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":0},"Mobility":0.9,"Delay":0.6,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":40},{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":40},"Mobility":0.9,"Delay":1,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":40},{"Position":{"X":0,"Y":70},"Mobility":0.9,"Delay":0.6,"Acceleration":1,"Radius":30}],"Normalization":{"Position":{"Minimum":-10,"Default":0,"Maximum":10},"Angle":{"Minimum":-10,"Default":0,"Maximum":10}}},{"Id":"PhysicsSetting5","Input":[{"Source":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"ParamAngleX"},"Weight":50,"Type":"X","Reflect":false},{"Source":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"ParamAngleY"},"Weight":50,"Type":"X","Reflect":false}],"Output":[{"Destination":{"Target":"Parameter","Id":"Param27"},"VertexIndex" m":-10,"Default":0,"Maximum":10},"Angle":{"Minimum":-20,"Default":0,"Maximum":20}}}]}
